parameters.content:
## RED TEAM
Adversarial Attack Phase
CMO + CFO identify vulnerabilities in parallel

## BLUE TEAM
Defensive Response Phase
CTO + COO defend against ALL attacks in parallel

## WHITE TEAM
Impartial Adjudication
CEO evaluates each attack/defense pair

## FINAL REPORT
Risk assessment, score,
and recommendations

# P17: Red/Blue/White Team — Adversarial Stress-Testing

Red team attacks a plan from multiple angles. Blue team defends. White team adjudicates. All agents use Claude Opus 4.6 with extended thinking.

**Setup:** Create an HTTP Header Auth credential named "Anthropic API Key" with header name `x-api-key` and your API key as the value.
